member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EntityFramework.Repositories.ReadModel.BaseCachedSpecificationRepository`1.OwnedKeysMatch(System.Object,System.Object,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.IProperty})
member.summary: Returns true when and share the same values for all .

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EntityFramework.Repositories.ReadModel.BaseCachedSpecificationRepository`1.ReloadAndApplyChangesAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reloads the entity from the DB with tracking, copies scalar values from , then reconciles all owned collections. Extracted to avoid duplication between UpdateAsync and UpdateRangeAsync.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EntityFramework.Repositories.ReadModel.BaseCachedSpecificationRepository`1.GetEntityId(`0)
member.summary: Extracts the primary key (Id) from the entity using EF Core metadata.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EntityFramework.Repositories.ReadModel.BaseCachedSpecificationRepository`1.ApplyOwnedCollectionChanges(`0,`0)
member.summary: Reconciles owned collection navigations between a tracked DB entity and the incoming (detached) entity. Items present only in are inserted; items present only in are deleted. Identity is determined by the owned entity's configured primary key.
